title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #9, Carrot, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Chiffon as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Whole cake island sweet city

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: roaa aaaar

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Roa AAR!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't get any information on the whereabouts of the straw hats' ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What are the sea cucumber transmitters doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Rooo AAAa Rrr!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's enough in our network that you'd probably hit one if you just chucked a stone into the water at random....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way that their ship can pass through that completely undetected!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up already, pekoms! How long are you gonna wait?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ROO OAA AAR!

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: Big bro Pedro Oooo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I feel his pain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, his lifelong friend, and his mentor, chose to die by self- destruction!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah, and he was our enemy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The straw hat pirates will be the ones to one day lead this world to a new dawn.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even I was a bit taken aback- amour.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think back to Pedro as he was 5 years ago, crying and beg- ging to be spared!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That man saw fit to lay down his own life to let those pirates set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So what?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I believe we may have severely underestimated straw hat Luffy- Oissant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yeah right. Pirates are no big deal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at the ruins of Mama's Castle strewn around you! Can you still say that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That was just an accidental occur- Pence!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An accidental occurrence? And I assume the sea cucumbers are accidentally mis- sing their ship?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What're you trying to say? That they planned all of this from the start?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The proud ruler soon loses his crown!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We cannot afford even the smallest chance of Mama's name being besmirched.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should dispatch powerful ships to the further reaches of our territory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: PRARRAR!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Mont D'Or! A call from Lord Custard!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: He was chasing Bege, wasn't he...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Did he end him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No... it seems they've lost sight of his ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems the sea cucumber transmitters have stopped relaying information on their location, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Investigate the sea floor at once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There should be more of them coming after us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like their sea cucumbers aren't reacting to our den den den den den mushi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I've never heard of such a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But it sure is convenient!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hurry! To cacao Island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Firelink Pirates ship Nostra Castello

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going straight to Chiffon! As the Crow flies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GACHA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: reporting in from the German's ship, Nuss torte!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Brother! What's the situation with the germa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Your ten- thousand- strong force decimated them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Their entire country is in shambles!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just what I like to hear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But don't tell me...

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
